enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his first real ride on his new Kawasaki KLX 400 SR dirt bike around Boulder, CO, including running out of gas twice, getting help from a county utility worker, pulling an accidental wheelie, and reflections on motorcycle safety and the adrenaline risk of riding. He also touches on plans for his website/YouTube channel and notes his body is rejecting oatmeal for breakfast.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: motorcycles are genuinely dangerous and impulsive personalities should not ride them — people don't realize how close to wrecking they are
won't lend it to his brother because his brother is too impulsive and will eventually crash
they complement each other perfectly and motorcycling won't replace push biking — they serve different needs
his body is rejecting it and he probably can't eat it anymore, at least not with chocolate
